evidence.observation: Found 15 live module directories under erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/: accounting, admin, auth, company, demo, factory, hr, inventory, invoice, portal, production, purchasing, rbac, reports, sales
docs/modules/MODULE-INVENTORY.md contains a table with 15 rows, one per module

evidence.step: Verify all required modules present in inventory
evidence.observation: All 15 required modules present: accounting, admin, auth, company, demo, factory, hr, inventory, invoice, portal, production, purchasing, rbac, reports, sales. Coverage Notes section explicitly states: 'This inventory covers all 15 live module directories'

evidence.step: Verify each entry has Canonical Packet link
evidence.observation: All 15 entries have Canonical Packet column populated. 4 modules (accounting, hr, inventory, sales) link to existing AGENTS.md packets. 11 modules link to source directory with '(per-module packet pending)' marker
Exact 1:1 match between the 15 inventory entries and the 15 live module directories. No extra entries, no missing entries.
